content.text: The CBSE Class 12 Biology Board Exam 2026 was conducted on 13 March. Students who appeared for the exam are now searching for the Biology question paper to check the questions and analyze their performance.

content.text: According to students, the Biology paper was moderate in difficulty. Most questions were directly based on NCERT concepts including Genetics, Biotechnology, and Human Health & Disease.

content.question: When was the CBSE Class 12 Biology Exam 2026 conducted?
content.answer: The CBSE Class 12 Biology Board Exam 2026 was conducted on 13 March 2026.
